headline: Has Most Of The Upside In General Motors (GM) Already Been Priced In?
summary: If you are wondering whether General Motors at around US$79 is still offering value or if most of the upside has already played out, the next sections will help you cut through the noise and focus on what the numbers say. The stock has moved 1.6% over the past week and 4.3% over the last 30 days, while year to date it shows a 2.4% decline and a 74.1% return over the past year, with a very large 3 year return and a 40.2% return over 5 years. headline: Ford and GM Face Massive Dilemma as Lucrative Trends Shift Again
summary: Years ago, Detroit automakers were all too eager to get rid of their sedan offerings in favor of SUVs and trucks, but what if consumer demand changes? Evidence says it's happening.
